/CAL:BENCH WARRANT RETRUN/BWDNC/X:LOVE WAIVER/ACM/CTORD:DEFEDANT MUST ABIDE BY THE PREVIOUS TERMS AND CONDITIONS AS PART OF THE RELEASE/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENC 05-31-22 IN DEPT 11/DOP/
/CAL:DISPOSITION/FTA/ACMRVKD/BWI/BAIL:25,000/BWNUM:1ST/X: 1 OF 3 BENCHWARRANTS ISSUED THIS DATE/NIGHTSERV/X:THE COURT RESERVES ON THE 60TH LASTDAY OF 04-29-22/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/NTW60/LD:03-29-22/ACM/X:DEFENDANT IS TO CHECK IN 5X PER WEEK FOR SUPERVISION/X:DEFENDANT IS TO PROVIDE PROOF OF ENGAGEMENT WITH SAMOAN COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT CENTER FOR CASE MANAGEMENT, EMPLOYMENTAND HOUSING SERVICES/CONTD:DISPOSITION/DOP/

/CAL:FOR I & A AND PLEA/X:DEFENDANT IS APPEARING VIA ZOOM/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHTTO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX:02-14-22/X:THE 60TH DAY IS 03-29-22/X:BAIL REMAINS AS PREVIOUSLY SET $25,000/CONTD ACM ELIG RPT, DOP/X:MATTER IS REFERRED TOPRE-TRIAL DIVERSION FOR AN IN-CUSTODY ASSESSMENT,/CONTD:ACM POST-ARRAIGNMENT ELIGIBILITY REPORT & PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/X:EST 45 MINS/
